ddt:Target.Name: EDC17C42_1707_700_V01
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: X32 Moteurs: R9M405*406 ECU: EDC17C42 Logiciels: 1707_700 ------------------------------------------------------------- Date: 24/05/2013 Auteur: Constantin GHIGEANU ------------------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence:
DID (RENAULT) : MCD_Config_1707_700_AR0_DG_DGT_DAT_0_13.12.0_KP_1.4 DID (FOURNISSEUR) : a_dg_dgt_das_msgdiag_176_xx_d_a(5.0) DTC : LM 30
LM: LM 22
Base de depart: EDC17C42_1707_600_V01.xml ------------------------------------------------------------- Historique:
Version 01:
- ajoute les DIDs Renault: $255F $25A1 $28D7 $28D8 $28E0 $F120 $F140 $FEE0 $FEFF - evolution des DIDs Renault: $25AA $F190 - maj les routines et IO control en conformité avec le spec. - maj "Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1317 (jusq'au item 36)" - maj Auto-ident: 144 ($90) "037" "1707" "7000"
=============================== OLDER VERSIONS:
EDC17C42_1707_600_V01 Version 01: - ajoute les DIDs: $FD34 $FE33 $FE34 $2086 $250E $208B - maj auto-ident: 90h - "037" - "1707" - "6000" - Items bases DDT2000

Label.Text: Si Etat protege = 1 alors demarrage impossible
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est deprotege et n'interdit pas le demarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protege car il ne recoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protege car la BCM ne repond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifie la cle ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monte sur le vehicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protege car la BCM n'envoie pas la cle secrete: l'ECM n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisee a envoyer la cle secrete
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotege" et n'autorise pas le demarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a detecte une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Label.Text: These values must be entered manually before being rewritten.
- The button "RESET" can write the initialization values of a component following the change of it.
The values are automatically initialized when pressing the button, no input is required.
In the following screens you will find two buttons: Writing and reset.
- After reprogramming or changing a calculator button "WRITE" lets rewrite the previously saved values.

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.CSF history - 10 last stored values of vehicule speed for each distance step
DataWrite.CSF history - 10 last stored values of engine operating point for each check temperature request of the CSF statemachine
DataWrite.CSF - Initial value of sr flip flop for ecu init
DataWrite.CSF - Value of the driven distance when the last particle filter change occurs
DataWrite.CSF - CSF equivalent load
DataWrite.CSF - Total distance driven since last regeneration update at the Ecu init
DataWrite.CSF - Intake air temperature computed average value of loading state used for PFT threshold adaptation
DataWrite.Driving condition target for next CSF rgn: Null (delivery use), Cold (urban intensive use) or Medium (normally mixed use)
DataWrite.CSF - Vehicle speed request by the light signal
DataWrite.CSF - Indicates the vehicle mileage just after a successful regeneration
DataWrite.CSF - Indicates a successful regeneration
DataWrite.CSF - Indicates the number of regeneration failures since the last sucess
DataWrite.CSF - Reference distance (position) of last hot opportunity
DataWrite.CSF - Ref distance (position) of last hot or med opportunity
DataWrite.CSF - Ref distance (position) of last hot or med or cold opportunity
DataWrite.CSF - soot load speed calculation status
DataWrite.CSF - boolean indicating if dft value is used for load speed estimation, or currently measured
DataWrite.CSF - Counter for the time spent in the regeneration request state, initial value stored in eeprom

Label.Text: Bit x = 0 > Learning Mode Bit x = 1 > Correction Mode
Bit x = 0 > Learning Mode Bit x = 1 > Correction Mode
Bit Coded > Bit position 0 = First Cylinder - Firing order
Bit Coded > Bit position 0 = First Cylinder - Firing order
Warning, if injector is in "learning mode", the "correction mode" resolution is still applied : 0,002 instead of 1
Warning, if injector is in "learning mode", the "correction mode" resolution is still applied : 0,002 instead of 1
Control unit change, old VCA learning values are available:
Control unit change, old VCA learning values are not available :
- Read out of VCA values from EEPROM of old control unit and copy to new control unit
Change of one or more injectors:
- Cylinder individual reset of EEPROM-values of VCA

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 3: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joue
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joue
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Supported tests run at least once per trip
